requirement_topic.en: Electromagnetic Compatibility — Household Refrigerating Appliances in Chile (SEC / NCh IEC, no horizontal EMC certification regime)
requirement_topic.zh: 电磁兼容——智利家用制冷器具（SEC/NCh IEC，无横向EMC认证制度）
requirement_topic.zht: 電磁相容——智利家用製冷器具（SEC/NCh IEC，無橫向EMC認證制度）

summary.en: Chile does not operate a stand-alone, EU-style mandatory electromagnetic-compatibility certification regime (there is no Chilean equivalent of the EU EMC Directive 2014/30/EU requiring CE-style EMC self-declaration for every household appliance). SEC's mandatory product-control focus for refrigerators is electrical safety, not EMC emissions. Radio-frequency and telecommunications aspects are regulated separately by SUBTEL (Subsecretaria de Telecomunicaciones) — relevant only if a refrigerator incorporates wireless connectivity (Wi-Fi/Bluetooth for smart-home features), in which case the radio module requires SUBTEL type approval (homologacion). For a conventional refrigerator without radio functions, there is no separate mandatory EMC certificate; manufacturers nonetheless commonly hold EMC test data to CISPR 14 / IEC 61000 series as good engineering practice and for the importer's records. INN may publish NCh standards adopting CISPR/IEC EMC texts, but these are not enforced as a blanket mandatory EMC certification for refrigerators the way SEC enforces electrical safety.
summary.zh: 智利没有独立的、类EU的强制性电磁兼容认证制度（不存在类似欧盟EMC指令2014/30/EU、要求每件家用器具进行CE式EMC自我声明的智利对应规定）。SEC对电冰箱强制产品管控的重点是电气安全，而非EMC发射。射频与电信方面由SUBTEL（电信次长室）单独监管——仅在电冰箱含无线连接功能（Wi-Fi/蓝牙等智能家居功能）时适用，此时无线模块须取得SUBTEL型式核准（homologacion）。对于不含无线功能的常规电冰箱，没有单独的强制性EMC证书；尽管如此，制造商通常仍持有符合CISPR 14/IEC 61000系列的EMC检测数据，作为良好工程实践及供进口商存档。INN可能发布采纳CISPR/IEC EMC文本的NCh标准，但这些标准并不像SEC执行电气安全那样作为对电冰箱的全面强制EMC认证执行。
summary.zht: 智利沒有獨立的、類EU的強制性電磁相容認證制度（不存在類似歐盟EMC指令2014/30/EU、要求每件家用器具進行CE式EMC自我聲明的智利對應規定）。SEC對電冰箱強制產品管控的重點是電氣安全，而非EMC發射。射頻與電信方面由SUBTEL（電信次長室）單獨監管——僅在電冰箱含無線連接功能（Wi-Fi/藍牙等智慧家居功能）時適用，此時無線模組須取得SUBTEL型式核准（homologacion）。對於不含無線功能的常規電冰箱，沒有單獨的強制性EMC證書；儘管如此，製造商通常仍持有符合CISPR 14/IEC 61000系列的EMC檢測數據，作為良好工程實踐及供進口商存檔。INN可能發布採納CISPR/IEC EMC文本的NCh標準，但這些標準並不像SEC執行電氣安全那樣作為對電冰箱的全面強制EMC認證執行。

standards_or_laws: SUBTEL (Subsecretaria de Telecomunicaciones) type approval (homologacion) — required only for radio/wireless modules embedded in appliances (Wi-Fi/Bluetooth)
CISPR 14-1 / IEC 61000 series — international EMC standards commonly applied as engineering practice; not enforced as a blanket mandatory EMC certification for refrigerators in Chile
No Chilean horizontal mandatory EMC certification regime equivalent to EU Directive 2014/30/EU for household appliances

summary.en: China's EMC requirements for household appliances (including refrigerators) are mandatory: GB 4343.1-2018 (Electromagnetic disturbance characteristics of household appliances, electric tools and similar apparatus — Part 1: Emission limits and measurement methods; equivalent to CISPR 14-1:2016) governs emissions, with GB/T 4343.2-2020 (Part 2: Immunity) and GB 17625.1-2022 (harmonic current emissions; IDT IEC 61000-3-2:2020) supplementary. EMC compliance is part of the CCC mandatory certification regime administered by SAMR/CNCA — meaning EMC is a mandatory certification element in China but is NOT a mandatory stand-alone certification for non-radio refrigerators in Chile.
summary.zh: 中国家用器具（包括电冰箱）的电磁兼容要求为强制性：GB 4343.1-2018（家用器具、电动工具和类似器具的电磁骚扰特性——第1部分：发射限值和测量方法；等同CISPR 14-1:2016）管控发射，GB/T 4343.2-2020（第2部分：抗扰度）和GB 17625.1-2022（谐波电流发射；等同IEC 61000-3-2:2020）为补充。EMC合规属于市场监管总局/认监委（SAMR/CNCA）管理的CCC强制认证制度的组成部分——即EMC在中国是强制认证要素，但在智利对非无线电冰箱并非强制的独立认证。
summary.zht: 中國家用器具（包括電冰箱）的電磁相容要求為強制性：GB 4343.1-2018（家用器具、電動工具和類似器具的電磁騷擾特性——第1部分：發射限值和測量方法；等同CISPR 14-1:2016）管控發射，GB/T 4343.2-2020（第2部分：抗擾度）和GB 17625.1-2022（諧波電流發射；等同IEC 61000-3-2:2020）為補充。EMC合規屬於市場監管總局/認監委（SAMR/CNCA）管理的CCC強制認證制度的組成部分——即EMC在中國是強制認證要素，但在智利對非無線電冰箱並非強制的獨立認證。

standards_or_laws: GB 4343.1-2018 — Electromagnetic disturbance characteristics of household appliances, electric tools and similar apparatus — Part 1: Emission limits and measurement methods (mandatory; equivalent to CISPR 14-1:2016; enforced under CCC by SAMR/CNCA)
GB/T 4343.2-2020 — Part 2: Immunity — product family standard (recommended; equivalent to CISPR 14-2:2015)
GB 17625.1-2022 — Limits for harmonic current emissions <= 16 A/phase (mandatory; IDT IEC 61000-3-2:2020)

gap.en: This is a case where Chile imposes a LIGHTER mandatory burden than China: a conventional (non-wireless) refrigerator does not need a separate mandatory EMC certificate to enter Chile, because Chile has no horizontal mandatory EMC certification regime for household appliances comparable to the EU EMC Directive or to China's mandatory GB 4343.1 within CCC. Practical points for exporters: (1) retain CISPR 14-1 / GB 4343.1 EMC test data in the importer's technical file as good practice and for any future market-surveillance query; (2) if the refrigerator model includes Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, or any RF module, that module must obtain SUBTEL type approval (homologacion) before the appliance is marketed — this is the one mandatory EMC-adjacent gate in Chile; (3) confirm with the SEC-authorised certifier and the importer whether any current SEC protocol bundles EMC checks into the safety certification for a given product family.
gap.zh: 这是智利强制负担轻于中国的情形：常规（非无线）电冰箱进入智利无需单独的强制EMC证书，因为智利没有类似欧盟EMC指令或中国CCC内强制GB 4343.1的家用器具横向强制EMC认证制度。对出口商的实务要点：（1）将CISPR 14-1/GB 4343.1 EMC检测数据保存在进口商技术文件中，作为良好实践并备未来市场监管查询；（2）若电冰箱型号含Wi-Fi、蓝牙或任何射频模块，该模块在器具上市前须取得SUBTEL型式核准（homologacion）——这是智利唯一与EMC相关的强制门槛；（3）向SEC授权认证机构及进口商确认现行SEC程序是否将某产品族的EMC检查并入安全认证。
gap.zht: 這是智利強制負擔輕於中國的情形：常規（非無線）電冰箱進入智利無需單獨的強制EMC證書，因為智利沒有類似歐盟EMC指令或中國CCC內強制GB 4343.1的家用器具橫向強制EMC認證制度。對出口商的實務要點：（1）將CISPR 14-1/GB 4343.1 EMC檢測數據保存在進口商技術文件中，作為良好實踐並備未來市場監管查詢；（2）若電冰箱型號含Wi-Fi、藍牙或任何射頻模組，該模組在器具上市前須取得SUBTEL型式核准（homologacion）——這是智利唯一與EMC相關的強制門檻；（3）向SEC授權認證機構及進口商確認現行SEC程序是否將某產品族的EMC檢查併入安全認證。

mandatory_status.target: Not separately mandatory for conventional refrigerators — Chile has no horizontal mandatory EMC certification regime for household appliances; SUBTEL type approval is mandatory only where a wireless/RF module is present
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB 4343.1-2018 EMC emission compliance is required within the CCC regime; GB/T 4343.2-2020 immunity is recommended; enforced by SAMR/CNCA

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chile imposes no stand-alone mandatory EMC certification on conventional household refrigerators, unlike China's mandatory GB 4343.1 within CCC. The only EMC-adjacent mandatory gate is SUBTEL type approval, triggered solely when the appliance contains a Wi-Fi/Bluetooth/RF module. Exporters should retain existing CISPR 14-1 / GB 4343.1 EMC data for the importer's technical file even though a separate Chilean EMC certificate is not required.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 与中国CCC内强制的GB 4343.1不同，智利对常规家用电冰箱不施加独立的强制EMC认证。唯一与EMC相关的强制门槛是SUBTEL型式核准，仅在器具含Wi-Fi/蓝牙/射频模块时触发。即便无需单独的智利EMC证书，出口商仍应将现有CISPR 14-1/GB 4343.1 EMC数据保存在进口商技术文件中。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 與中國CCC內強制的GB 4343.1不同，智利對常規家用電冰箱不施加獨立的強制EMC認證。唯一與EMC相關的強制門檻是SUBTEL型式核准，僅在器具含Wi-Fi/藍牙/射頻模組時觸發。即便無需單獨的智利EMC證書，出口商仍應將現有CISPR 14-1/GB 4343.1 EMC數據保存在進口商技術文件中。
